title: Lead Instructional Designer at American Institute

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at American Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Instructional Designer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
